_note: Scoring rubric per call type. 'patterns' = case-insensitive regex searched in the agent's (your) lines. Mirrors the active-hunter call scripts. Tune freely.

checkpoints.name: Name + brokerage
checkpoints.coach: Open with your name and Van Noy Real Estate.

checkpoints.name: Reason + destination
checkpoints.coach: Ask why they're selling and where they're headed.

checkpoints.name: Net vs FSBO / USP
checkpoints.coach: Show net-to-net and a USP (2% / Offer Guaranteed / Cancellation Guarantee).

checkpoints.name: Asked for the appointment
checkpoints.coach: Ask for a 20-minute appointment with a specific day/time.

checkpoints.name: Name + reference the expired
checkpoints.coach: Name + reference that it came off the market.

checkpoints.name: What went wrong
checkpoints.coach: Ask what they think went wrong last time.

checkpoints.name: Still motivated / timeline
checkpoints.coach: Confirm they still plan to move + the timeline.

checkpoints.name: Plan / price / marketing
checkpoints.coach: Show the plan: price + marketing/exposure that the last agent missed.

checkpoints.name: Asked for the appointment
checkpoints.coach: Ask for 20 minutes to show the plan.

checkpoints.name: Status + own/rent
checkpoints.coach: Qualify status; turn owners into sellers.

checkpoints.name: Buyer list or value
checkpoints.coach: Offer a curated list (buyer) or a value (owner).

checkpoints.name: Next step
checkpoints.coach: If intent, book 20 minutes; else tag the real timeline.

checkpoints.name: Pricing rationale
checkpoints.coach: Lead with pricing rationale, comps shown.

checkpoints.name: Asked for the signature
checkpoints.coach: Ask for the signature / next step — don't leave it open.
